data.text: M03/P03 A BLUE TINGED FELISIAN WORLD. AT 5.69 THERE WAS MOUNTAINOUS
BARREN GROUND, BUT A HOPPER BRIEFLY APPEARED. AT 0.50 A HILLY FORESTED
REGION WITH A LARGE GORGE VISIBLE WHILE LANDING AND ANOTHER HOPPER. AT
4.16 LANED NEAR A LARGE DOME SHAPED ICE MOUNTAIN IN A FROZEN BARREN
PLACE WITH SIGHTS FOR EXPLORERS IF YOU TRAVEL AFAR, HOWEVER, I WAS
SHADOWED BY AT LEAST TWO PERSISTENT HOPPERS, AND SIGHTED A SLINKING ONE
